scripts.build: npm run build -w apps/web && npm run build -w apps/api
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w apps/web && npm run lint -w apps/api
scripts.db:setup: npm run db:generate && npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed
scripts.db:deploy: npm run prisma:migrate:deploy -w apps/api && npm run prisma:seed -w apps/api
